title: What action taken against false cases under anti-conversion law? Allahabad High Court
description: The Allahabad High Court recently flagged concerns about a “disturbing trend” of false cases being registered by third parties under the Uttar Pradesh Prohibition of Unlawful Conversion of Religion Act, 2021 [Mohd Faizan and Others v State of UP and Others].A Division Bench of Justice Abdul Moin and Justice Pramod Kumar Srivastava made the observation in a case where three Muslim men were booked under the 2021 anti-conversion law.
